completed_tasks.name: Capture Phase 9 decisions and audit context
Revise 14 Phase 9 plans after checker findings
completed_tasks.progress: Revision files were written before interruption, but no second plan-checker pass has run. Treat every revision as unverified.

remaining_tasks.name: Run plan structure, decision coverage and Nyquist validation on revised files
Re-run gsd-plan-checker and fix any remaining blockers
Commit verified Phase 9 plans and record planned state

blockers.description: The revision was interrupted before checker verification; current PLAN/RESEARCH/VALIDATION/ROADMAP edits must not be treated as approved.
blockers.workaround: Resume at revision verification and re-run gsd-plan-checker before execute-phase.

blockers.description: An unrelated cleanup SQL is untracked and must remain byte-identical, untracked and unstaged.
blockers.workaround: Use the plan's SHA-256, exact porcelain and git-index absence checks; never rely on plain git diff for this file.

decisions.decision: Use the audited 20.7 workbook as the canonical Development/sample purchase-history source through preview-first reconciliation.
decisions.rationale: It supersedes the 19.5 source while immutable operational history must be retained.

decisions.decision: Material demand requires Manager approval before Purchasing can act; Purchasing is week/date scoped and Warehouse alone records actual receipt.
decisions.rationale: This closes the current workflow gap and preserves role ownership.

decisions.decision: Supplier selection requires quotation/latest-valid-receipt evidence and explicit confirmation; price exception is strictly above 15 percent.
decisions.rationale: Remove arbitrary fallback and the current dead-end price warning.

decisions.decision: No live/shared cleanup apply is autonomous; clone restore, fingerprint, two no-op reruns and operator evidence are mandatory.
decisions.rationale: Prevent destructive drift and prove idempotency before any real apply.

next_action: Read the Phase 9 handoff, acknowledge the two blocking anti-patterns, inspect the interrupted revision diff, run all GSD plan validations, then re-run gsd-plan-checker; do not execute Phase 9 yet.
context_notes: Initial plan checker reported 6 blockers and 2 warnings. The interrupted revision appears to have addressed resolved research questions, protected-SQL hashing/index checks, fail-fast PowerShell, required route/audit/visual suites, Nyquist mapping, missing file declarations and DAG parallelism. None of those fixes has received a second checker pass. User-owned README/.cursor/cleanup-SQL changes remain outside scope.
